name: Ticci Toby [⊗] Creepypasta
description:
Nice lil walk in the woods interrupted by weirdo with a hatchet. Or perhaps vice versa?

AnyPOV, User is a dumbass who walks alone in the woods. At night. During winter.

Art by @alpiite on Tumblr

《UPDATE: Moved some stuff around, gave him more info on the world setting, and tried a new thing to get his speech juuuust right. Now time to test drive and pray I guess》

Will DEFINITELY be updating and adding 2 this 4 the personality code stuff. Had to post immediately because I have no patience and needed him NOW

Been thinking about making creepypasta bots 4 a hot minute but only just now was hit with inspo. Mind you i wasn't huge in it back in the day but Toby and Candypop were personal faves that i actually read about and liked :p

FUN FACT: As an edgy middle schooler i didn't like clockwork because i was envious. I also never liked that bleached twink, his brother tho 👀

AAAGGGGGGHHH EDGY PHASE HITTING
